conversation.text: Hey Sarah, mark here from markeye. I just saw that you checked out the demo, so I wanted to reach out straight away. Was this regarding Pulse Media?
hi yeah thats right
nice one, what made you want to check out the demo.
honestly we've been growing quite fast and leads are slipping through, thought id see what you guys do
yeah fair enough, so what does Pulse Media do exactly
we're a digital marketing agency, mainly paid social and google ads for clients
nice, and for your own agencies leads, What channels are you mostly focused on right now or generating the most leads from the
mix of referrals and we run our own ads too ironically

haha yeah always the way with agencies
|||
roughly how many enquiries are we talking per month
|||
Ps Just helps me gauge if there's enough reason for a solution like ours here.
probably around 60 to 80
Okay, cool. So a decent amount then… and when those come in, what's the process, is there a team jumping on them straight away orrr

yeah we have a few people but honestly response times vary a lot
sometimes same day, sometimes takes a couple days depending on how busy we are

Yeah no worries, we hear it all the time. Typically we see a few problems that keep popping up, It's either speed to lead or follow up consistency or simply just the qualification of your leads. And teams end up wasting hours of time built up on leads that would never have converted in the first place.
|||
out of interest… Would you say there's one here that stands out more than another in particular? Or is it multiple?
To be honest with you, it's probably speed to lead and the consistency around that.
Okay, amazing. And I mean clues in the name markeye, That's what we specialise in and can definitely help.
Awesome.
have you tried anything before to fix it or is this your first time looking into AI Sales agents.?
we looked at a couple of chatbot things ages ago but they were awful, sounded so robotic

yeah most of them are honestly, That was actually the whole reason why we launched after five. We have been running an AI automation agency specializing in sales operations for a while now. But every time this problem came up, nothing quite did the job right.
|||
what we build is completely different, it's built from scratch around your tone and your sales process so it actually sounds like your team, not another generic bot
ok yeah thats what caught my eye on the site

makes sense
|||
Well I think the next best step would definitely be to book in a discovery call with the founder Louis where he can walk you through all things price, ROI, strategy, and seeing if we're a good fit for you or not.
|||
Did you want me to send over a link now? Or did you have any questions beforehand?
yeah whats the ballpark on cost

it's scope based so I can't give you an exact number here to be honest.
|||
Usually it comes in under a month of ad spend though, often just a fraction of it, and It's mostly a one off build fee and that is split 50/50 So that it's not all up front
ok that’s not bad actually, and how long to get it live

usually 2 to 3 weeks depending on what needs building
|||
he'd go through exactly how it would look for Pulse Media, give you a proper quote and timeline on the call
yeah ok im keen
Great, shall I send over the link then?
lets do it

https://calendly.com/markeye/free-discovery-call
|||
just grab whatever time works
done
Great. I'll let Louis know now and ping him over some details.
